name: golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev
title: golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev
description:
structured, composable logging for Go
package log15 provides an opinionated, simple toolkit for
best-practice logging in Go (golang) that is both human
and machine readable. It is modeled after the Go standard
library's io and net/http packages and is an alternative
to the standard library's log package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev because structured, composable logging for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-inconshreveable-log15-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
